style_rules:
<style_guide>
  <tone>natural_webnovel</tone>
  <dialogue_format>double_quotes</dialogue_format>
  <thoughts_format>italics</thoughts_format>
  <example_good>"I can't believe this happened," she said.</example_good>
  <example_avoid>"I cannot believe this has occurred," she stated.</example_avoid>
</style_guide>

<critical_rules>
  1. NO Korean/Chinese characters in output (ㅋㅋㅋ→"lol", 一片丹心→translate)
  2. Use EXACT glossary translations - never vary
  3. Gender tags override name assumptions (glossary is absolute)
  4. Technique names in quotes: "Demon Blossom Palm"
  5. Same character = same name throughout entire series
</critical_rules>

<output_format>
  Provide only the English translation without:
  - Chapter titles or # symbols
  - Quotation marks around entire text
  - Commentary or explanations
  - Any additional formatting headers
  Include footnotes only if complex cultural concepts require explanation.
</output_format>
